$comment: Locales + branches to ensure exist on the stack. Idempotent: any code/uid already present is skipped. fallbackLocale must point to a code that exists on the stack BEFORE this locale is created (master en-us always exists), so parents are listed before the locales that fall back to them. Two fallback chains are modelled: fr-ca -> fr-fr -> en-us and de-at -> de-de -> en-us.
